bird.name: Oriente warbler
bird.summary: The Oriente warbler (Teretistris fornsi) is one of two species of bird in the Cuban warbler family Teretistridae. It is endemic to central…

locations.name: 薩瓦納-卡馬圭群島
locations.summary: 薩瓦納-卡馬圭群島（西班牙語：Archipiélago de Sabana-Camagüey）是古巴的群島，位於該國中北部大西洋，橫跨475公里，由2,517個島嶼組成，面積約75,000平方公里，該群島設有35處保護區。

locations.name: 马埃斯特腊山脉

relations.subject: Oriente warbler
relations.evidence: The nominate subspecies of Oriente warbler is found in the mountains and coast of eastern Cuba and the Sabana-Camagüey Archipelago off the main island's north coast

relations.subject: Oriente warbler
relations.evidence: turquinensis is found in the Sierra Maestra along the southeastern Cuban coast
